statement.en: RNA-seq profiling of human embryoic stem cell–derived ventral midbrain dopaminergic lineage cells across four differentiation stages

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a provisional empirical dataset/protocol paper (dated 2026, future-dated or speculative). RNA-seq profiling generates observational data rather than proven theorems. The differentiation protocol is reproducible but subject to biological variation and methodological refinement. Classification as FLOWING reflects pre-validation status and ongoing refinement typical of experimental biology.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 分化の時間とともに、ドーパミン生産能力が指数関数的に開花していく

visualGlyph.interpretation: 段階を踏むごとに細胞の潜在性が膨らみ、神経系の輝きが増していく軌跡
